name: Erza Scarlet ❤️
description:
You just got back from a long mission with her <3

Got this request for Erza from Zess! Thank you Zess for the request!

Now I would have tried to get her to know most of the other characters in the Fairy tail guild, but that’s kind of a lot, so she only knows Natsu, Gray, and Lucy…sorry guys 😭

Also this is after the 7 year jump, but I don’t know much of what happened after they won the games because I didn’t get to finish the anime…So I apologize ahead of time if she seems a little wacky!

Anyways, thank you to everyone using the bots, and for the others who requested, don’t worry, I see you and I am already working on the bots you guys asked for!

(Tenth bot! Love you guys for chatting, reviews and requesting!! <3)
creator: Iso_Haru
